page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8ise.large is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with an Intel Xeon 8475B processor running at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz. The instance is configured with 2 dedicated physical cores and 1 thread per core, providing 2 vCPUs without hyperthreading. It is equipped with 8.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met through external network-attached volumes. It provides a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps. Additionally, the instance does not come with any complimentary public IPv4 addresses. There are no onboard GPU accelerators, making it unsuitable for hardware-accelerated workloads.

Given its balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and dedicated CPU allocation, the ecs.g8ise.large offers a stable resource profile for general-purpose workloads. The dedicated CPU execution model ensures consistent performance without the resource contention typical of shared-core or burstable instances. This makes it appropriate for lightweight web serving, microservices, development environments, and small-scale database applications that do not require high-speed local storage or intensive parallel processing.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8ise.large is a general-purpose virtual machine instance built on the KVM hypervisor and x86_64 architecture. Powered by a 2.7 GHz Intel Xeon 8475B processor, it features 2 dedicated physical cores with 1 thread per core, delivering 2 vCPUs. The instance is equipped with 8.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It lacks local storage and complimentary public IPv4 addresses, relying entirely on network-attached storage and external networking configurations. With a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps and no GPU acceleration, this instance is designed for consistent, non-burstable performance. It is suited for workloads such as lightweight web serving, microservices, and development environments that require stable dedicated compute resources without the need for high-speed local disk I/O.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8ise.large is a general-purpose instance featuring 2 dedicated Intel Xeon 8475B vCPUs, 8.0 GB RAM, 2 Gbps network bandwidth, and no local storage, designed for stable, lightweight workloads.

tagline: A dedicated dual-core general-purpose instance with a balanced memory-to-CPU ratio for consistent, lightweight enterprise workloads.
